name: Whiskas Cat Temptations Treats - Chicken & Cheese 60g
shortDescription: Treat your cat to the irresistible crunch of Whiskas Temptations Chicken Cat Treats 60g a delicious dual-texture snack with a crunchy outside and a soft, tasty center. Made with real chicken and enriched with essential vitamins and minerals, these cat treats are perfect for rewarding, training, or simply pampering your feline friend.
description: Formulated to satisfy your cat’s natural cravings, Whiskas Temptations Chicken Treats contain high-quality protein to support overall health and energy. The bite-sized pieces are easy to chew and ideal for cats of all breeds and life stages. Key Benefits Made with real chicken for a rich, meaty flavor cats love Crunchy outside with a soft center for an irresistible texture Enriched with vitamins and minerals to support overall wellbeing Perfect as a reward, training treat, or everyday snack Convenient resealable 60g pack for freshness Ingredients Cereals, oils and fats, vegetable by-products, meat and animal by-products (including 4% chicken), mineral substances, vegetable protein extracts, milk and milk by-products (including cheese derivatives). Analytical Constituents Protein: 22% Fat: 22% Fibre: 2% Inorganic Matter: 9% Feeding Guide Feed up to 12 treats daily and adjust your cat’s main meal accordingly. Always provide fresh, clean drinking water. Storage Instructions Store in a cool, dry place. Once opened, consume within 4 weeks for maximum freshness. Buy Whiskas Temptations Chicken Cat Treats 60g online today for a tasty cat snack your furry companion will keep coming back for.
